title: odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. caliacrae
intro: Odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. caliacrae, also known as Caliacra mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Caliacra mint include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing headaches, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
